description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly metallic gray exterior and teal-tinted cockpit windows. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, each featuring a circular teal accent near the tips. The fuselage is compact and tapers sharply at the nose, with a prominent vertical stabilizer at the rear. Twin jet engines are mounted beneath the wings, with visible exhausts at the back. The airplane is marked with the identifier 'IX-04' on the side, and the overall design suggests a high-speed, possibly unmanned or advanced piloted craft.
description: A sleek, metallic gray airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, teal cockpit windows, and twin rear jet engines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sharp nose, angular fuselage, and teal-tinted cockpit window, with jet engine exhausts visible at the rear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'IX-04' marking, swept-back wings with teal accents, and the compact, angular body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large central exhaust, wing configuration, and the vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the wing and engine arrangement, as well as the angular tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with swept wings and circular inboard accents; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings near the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and teal-tinted window.
